note: Codified from the City of Dripping Springs Code of Ordinances, Chapter 30 (Zoning and Development Code), Exhibit A, Section 3 (Zoning Districts) — Supplement 10, current 2026. Source is Municode; each district cites its own Section 3.x deep-link. MODELING NOTES: (1) The Dripping Springs code states only 'impervious coverage'/'impervious cover' per district and does NOT state a separate building lot-coverage cap, so max_impervious_pct is ordinance-sourced and max_lot_coverage_pct is flagged not_specified in provenance, carrying the impervious value as a conservative stand-in (the envelope draw uses setbacks, not this field). (2) SF-1 side yard is stated as 'Total of 40 feet combining both side yards with a minimum of 15 feet on either side' — the per-side minimum (15) is codified as side_ft; SF-1 states no distinct corner rule so side_corner_ft mirrors side_ft. (3) Distinct corner side yards are stated only for SF-3 (7.5) and SF-4 (15); other residential districts state no separate corner value so side_corner_ft mirrors side_ft. (4) For commercial districts (O/LR/GR/CS/I), side_ft is the base 'Minimum side yard' and side_corner_ft is the '__ feet adjacent to a public street or residential lot' figure. (5) Heights are 'two and one-half stories, or 40 feet' — the 40 ft cap is codified.

side_ft.quote: Minimum side yard: Total of 40 feet combining both side yards with a minimum of 15 feet on either side.

side_corner_ft.quote: No distinct corner side yard stated for SF-1; mirrors the per-side minimum of 15 feet.

max_height_ft.quote: Maximum two and one-half stories, or 40 feet for the main building or house, whichever

max_lot_coverage_pct.quote: Dripping Springs states impervious coverage only, not a separate building lot-coverage cap; stand-in equals impervious value.

rear_ft.quote: Minimum rear yard: Minimum 25 feet from the main building.

side_corner_ft.quote: No distinct corner side yard stated for SF-2; mirrors the side yard minimum of 15 feet.

max_height_ft.quote: Maximum two and one-half stories, or 40 feet whichever is less, for the main building

max_lot_coverage_pct.quote: Dripping Springs states impervious cover only, not a separate building lot-coverage cap; stand-in equals impervious value.

rear_ft.quote: Minimum rear yard setback: Ten feet.

side_ft.quote: Minimum side yard setback: Five feet; corner lots, seven and one-half feet from the street right-of-way.

side_corner_ft.quote: Minimum side yard setback: Five feet; corner lots, seven and one-half feet from the street right-of-way.

side_corner_ft.quote: Minimum side yard: Minimum ten feet; 15 feet from a street right-of-way for a corner lot.

max_height_ft.quote: Maximum two and one-half stories, or 40 feet, whichever is less, for the main building

side_ft.quote: Single-family attached dwellings are not required to have a side yard, with the exception of a minimum 15-foot side yard adjacent to a street.

side_corner_ft.quote: a minimum 15-foot side yard adjacent to a street

front_ft.quote: Minimum front yard: 30 feet; all areas adjacent to a street shall be deemed front yards.

max_lot_coverage_pct.quote: Dripping Springs states impervious cover only, not a separate building lot-coverage cap; stand-in equals impervious value.

max_impervious_pct.quote: Impervious cover : 60 percent total, including main buildings and accessory buildings.
